zh.lifeSummary: 當Roesia de Vernon於大約1223年出生在英國英格蘭爾希布盧可時，她的父親Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook47歲，母親Auda Malbank50歲。她和Sir Benedict de Blakeham至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1300年在英國英格蘭爾保斯托享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roesia de Vernon于大约1223年出生在英国英格兰爾希布盧可时，她的父亲Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook47岁，母亲Auda Malbank50岁。她和Sir Benedict de Blakeham至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1300年在英国英格兰爾保斯托享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Roesia
meanings: A baptismal name derived, like the surname Rous, Rouse, Rowse, from Old French rous, red; from Latin rufus.

en.lifeSummary: When Roesia de Vernon was born about 1223, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, was 47 and her mother, Auda Malbank, was 50. She had at least 1 son with Sir Benedict de Blakeham. She died about 1300, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roesia de Vernon est née environ 1223, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Auda Malbank, avait 50 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Benedict de Blakeham. Elle est décédée environ 1300, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roesia de Vernon um 1223 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook 47 und ihre Mutter Auda Malbank 50. Sie hatte mit Sir Benedict de Blakeham mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1300 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roesia de Vernon è nata il circa 1223 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Auda Malbank, aveva 50 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Benedict de Blakeham. Morì circa 1300, nel Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roesia de Vernonが約1223年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrookは47歳，母Auda Malbankは50歳であった。彼女はSir Benedict de Blakehamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1300年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roesia de Vernon(이)가 대략 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Auda Malbank(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 Sir Benedict de Blakeham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roesia de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1223, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Auda Malbank, tinha 50 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Benedict de Blakeham. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roesia de Vernon родилась около 1223 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Auda Malbank, 50. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Benedict de Blakeham. Она умерла около 1300 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roesia de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1223, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Warin de Vernon , 6th Baron of Shipbrook, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Auda Malbank, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Benedict de Blakeham. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
